summary: Created ReleasePilot MVP Round 1 documentation package: README.md (5KB), FAQ.md (8KB with 22 Q&As), landing/index.md (5KB), docs/SPEC.md (12KB), docs/ARCHITECTURE.md (25KB), scripts/demo.sh (16KB executable). All deliverables focus on AI-powered release documentation generation from git commits, targeting engineering teams and solo developers.
